# 5 Commits Per Day Checklist

Copy this into your daily routine. Push to GitHub so your activity shows on your profile.  
Goal: 5 commits/day for the 2-month roadmap.

## Today: ___________

- [ ] **Commit 1** (feature): _________________________________
- [ ] **Commit 2** (fix): _________________________________
- [ ] **Commit 3** (refactor): _________________________________
- [ ] **Commit 4** (test): _________________________________
- [ ] **Commit 5** (docs/config): _________________________________
- [ ] `git add -A && git status`
- [ ] `git commit -m "..."` (×5)
- [ ] `git push origin main`

## Good commit message examples

- `feat: add contribute tx builder with Fleet SDK`
- `fix: wallet disconnect clears store`
- `refactor: extract campaign box helpers`
- `test: explorer getUnspentBoxesByAddress`
- `docs: add ROADMAP and commit checklist`
